summary: Frontend-only re-test of Fitness Quest V3.2 (Tutorial overlay, Mute toggle/Sound FX, Gear with STR/AGI/END bonuses, BUY/CHEST slot+bonus persistence fix). All 11 critical flows passed. The slot/bonus persistence bug flagged in iteration_5 is FIXED: purchased gear (Iron Adept Plate) and Mystery Chest gear drops now correctly carry slot + bonus into localStorage and render with slot label + bonus text + functional EQUIP button in BAG.

integration_issues.issue: When chests are opened rapidly via Playwright (programmatic clicks), the ChestRevealModal is occasionally not visible/dismissed quickly; toast 'Not enough gold' may appear in successor opens once gold runs out. Underlying purchase + drop persistence still works correctly (verified via localStorage inspection). May or may not be reproducible by humans; suggest verifying click cadence handling.

tests_executed.tutorial_5_slides_carousel: PASS — 5 slides, dots 0..4, NEXT labels correct, final 'BEGIN THE QUEST' visible, completes & sets fq_tutorial_completed=1
tests_executed.tutorial_skip_button: PASS — SKIP closes and persists fq_tutorial_completed=1
tests_executed.mute_toggle_persistence: PASS — toggles VolumeX/Volume2 icon, writes fq_sound_muted to localStorage, survives reload, no console errors from sounds
tests_executed.buy_iron_adept_plate_then_bag_shows_slot: PASS — BAG card shows 'ARMOR' label + '+1 END' (emerald) + enabled EQUIP button
tests_executed.equip_armor_and_hero_effective_endurance: PASS — Hero shows END=4 with 'base 3 +1' emerald label; HP display reads X/30 (10 + 4*5)
tests_executed.sell_button_disabled_when_equipped: PASS — sell-gear-{id}-btn becomes disabled after EQUIP, enabled after UNEQUIP
tests_executed.second_armor_replaces_first_same_slot: PASS — equipping Steelborn Cuirass makes previously equipped Iron Adept Plate available to equip again (replaced)
tests_executed.effective_strength_with_steelborn_armor: PASS — base STR=3, +1 STR → effective 4 shown with '3 +1' label
tests_executed.mystery_chest_drop_persists_slot_and_bon: PASS — confirmed Iron Shortsword chest drop persisted as {slot:'weapon', bonus:{strength:1,...}} in localStorage AND BAG card shows '· WEAPON' + '+1 STR' + functional EQUIP button
tests_executed.localStorage_equippedGearIds_persists_ac: PASS — equipped armor id remains identical after reload
tests_executed.exploration_regression_locked_zones_and_: PASS — Frostbite, Caldera, and SPECIAL EVENT card all render

critical_code_review_comments: useGameData.js has duplicated gear-entry construction in buyGear, openMysteryChest (gear branch) and grantFreeChest — recommend extracting `makeGearEntry(gearLike)` helper to keep slot/bonus persistence DRY and prevent regressions.
openMysteryChest and grantFreeChest gear-drop logic is duplicated 90% (only the price/gold deduction differs). Could be extracted to a single `_rollChestDrop()` helper.
useGameData.js is ~610 lines; consider splitting into smaller domain hooks (combat/economy/streak/gear).

Camp.jsx handleMuteToggle reads `isMuted()` immediately after `toggleMuted()` which is fine but the comment 'play click only if we just unmuted' relies on global mutable state — works but could be made explicit by returning new state from toggleMuted.

Chest reveal modal click-through timing: when opens are triggered programmatically in succession, the AnimatePresence + Toast may race. Consider blocking the OPEN button while a reveal modal is mounted to avoid UX confusion.
seed_data_creation: Seeded localStorage 'fitness_quest_v1' with name='Tester', class='warrior', level=5, stats={STR:3,AGI:2,END:3}, gold=2000–5000 across tests, hp=25, empty gear/equippedGearIds. Tutorial reset via removeItem('fq_tutorial_completed'). Boost popup suppressed via setItem('fq_boost_shown_date', today).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All V3.2 polish + slot/bonus persistence fixes verified working at viewport 420x800. Storage key 'fitness_quest_v1'. If further bug regressions reported, focus on: (a) chest reveal modal race conditions, (b) effective stat label rendering in Hero, (c) sell-when-equipped guard. No code changes were made in this iteration.
rca_notes: Previous iteration_5 noted that buyGear/openMysteryChest gear entries persisted only {id,name,tier,sellValue} dropping slot+bonus. Current code at /app/frontend/src/hooks/useGameData.js lines 328-335, 380-387, 422-429 now explicitly include slot + bonus on the persisted gear entry — verified end-to-end.
